reviews.comment:
ASco el registro automoro de ahí.Con turno igual esperas un montón,te atienden re mal,vas de aca para allá a haceras cosas y a rendir a 20 y 50 .Mala atención de las mujeres y no entienden nada vergonzoso!!no saquen turno ahí!

(Translated by Google)
The vehicle registration office there is disgusting. Even with an appointment, you still wait ages, the service is terrible, you're sent back and forth trying to get things done and taking exams for 20 or 50 minutes. The women there are awful and don't understand anything—it's shameful! Don't make an appointment there!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9098900885435931533/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURla0pLRHJnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Fui a realizar el servicio del auto.  Bien atendido. Y cómo socio buen precio: aceite (4 litros), filtros de aire y aceite $15800.

(Translated by Google)
I went to get my car serviced. Excellent service. And as a member, a great price: oil (4 liters), air and oil filters for $15,800.
